round-0 smoke launches; no W&B run was ever created (project did not exist before round 1). Marked abandoned so they stop appearing in find_pending_launches.
round-0 smoke launches; no W&B run was ever created. Marked abandoned.

Trainer crashed loading a stale n_layers=8 checkpoint into an n_layers=6 model. Missing keys: model.transformer.tf_layers.7.norm_y2.{weight,bias}. Root cause: wrapper run_id formula (discrete_diffusion_DiffusionModule_lr2e-4_wd1e-12_s0) does not include n_layers, so this run shared a Modal output dir with a prior n_layers=8 SBM run. Fix: add force_fresh flag or include n_layers in the wrapper run_id. Wandb run https://wandb.ai/graph_denoise_team/tmgg-smallest-config-sweep/runs/m1uwn3es exists but only logged init metadata.

Hydra preflight crashed: GraphDataModule.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument num_nodes. Root cause: base_config_discrete_diffusion_generative.yaml has data.num_nodes=20 at top level for the SyntheticCategoricalDataModule default; +data=pyg_enzymes merges (does not replace) the data dict, so the leftover num_nodes=20 is passed to GraphDataModule which strict-rejects. SBM works because SpectreSBMDataModule has **_metadata catch-all. Fix: add ~data.num_nodes to wrapper or change pyg_enzymes.yaml to nullify the legacy field.

Killed at sweep reset 2026-04-30. Sharing run dir discrete_diffusion_DiffusionModule_lr2e-4_wd1e-12_s0/ with ENZYMES anchor (same lr/wd/seed, no dataset/n_layers in run_id) and with v1 long-run leftovers. Async-eval workers loaded prior-run checkpoints (e.g. step_70579.ckpt from v1) and reported metrics from those — observed gen-val/* values in W&B for this run are NOT from its actual training. Patch shipped: generate_run_id includes data._target_ and model.model.n_layers; force_fresh defaults to True.

Killed at sweep reset 2026-04-30. This run was in its own dir (..._fresh_20260430T061359/) so its metrics WERE valid, but reset cancelled it for a clean restart under the new generate_run_id formula (includes dataset + n_layers axes natively, no per-launch force_fresh needed for axis cuts).

Killed at sweep reset 2026-04-30. Sharing run dir with SBM anchor (same wrapper run_id formula). Async-eval at scheduled_step=70579 loaded checkpoint step_70579.ckpt — a leftover SBM checkpoint from v1 long-run, NOT an ENZYMES checkpoint. The promising-looking early gen-val/* metrics for this run are from cross-dataset stale checkpoints. Same fix as SBM anchor entry above.

Killed mid-flight on a misread perf signal: watcher was reading wandb _step (1119) instead of trainer/global_step (8557). Run was actually healthy at ~170 steps/min, projecting 100k in ~10h. Watcher patched (commit 77b87ea5) to read trainer/global_step. Relaunched as fc-01KQEYR2D76Q3GZQGYFE6T2413.
Killed for the same reason as the SBM anchor (misread perf). Relaunched as fc-01KQEYRG7VMM0NRX6FWV5MR0BF.

Round 2 closed early after 4 trustworthy in-band data points (steps 10/20/30k landed; 40k mid-eval). Decision: matched-step comparison vs SBM L6 at steps 10/20/30k shows the two configs are statistically indistinguishable on every threshold metric within the eval-noise floor (32 graphs / sbm_accuracy ±0.15 abs). Both pods bounce sbm_accuracy identically (anchor 0.34→0.59→0.375; L6 0.56→0.44→0.41→0.56). Saved ~-20 by stopping early; trajectory was sufficiently characterized.

Round 2 closed early. L6 trajectory in-band: {10k:[3/6, sbm_acc=0.56], 20k:[3/6, 0.44], 30k:[5/6, 0.41], 40k:[5/6, 0.5625]}. At matched step 30k L6 BEAT anchor (5/6 vs 3/6). Both configs noisy-equivalent within ±0.15 abs sbm_acc noise floor. PROVISIONAL DECISION: n_layers=6 is safely shrinkable for SPECTRE SBM. Queue a re-seed of L6 in round 3 to confirm, alongside the next axis cut (dim_ffy per round-0 pre-rank).

Round 2 closed early after 17 sat points. ENZYMES anchor saturated to 4/5 PASS by step 60-70k: degree_mmd=0.0048 PASS (HiGen ceil 0.006), clustering=0.049 PASS, modularity=0.391 PASS, spectral=0.033→0.028 stable, orbit=0.020 borderline ✗ (HiGen ceil 0.003). Run is the path-D in-house anchor for ENZYMES spectral_mmd — locking 0.025 ceil in anchors.yaml.
